description: Hash integrity verification and self-healing for Ethica core files

tools.name: guard_status
tools.description: Show vault status — sealed or unsealed, file count, seal date, quick integrity summary

tools.name: guard_seal
tools.description: Seal Ethica — hash all core files and modules, copy to vault, write manifest. The lock moment. To reseal: guard seal confirm
tools.input: optional: 'confirm' to reseal an already-sealed vault

tools.name: guard_verify
tools.description: Verify integrity of all protected files against vault manifest. Reports clean, modified, and missing files.

tools.name: guard_heal
tools.description: Restore tampered or missing files from vault. Usage: guard heal all | guard heal core/chat_engine.py
tools.input: 'all' to heal everything, or a partial file path to target specific files

name: EthicaGuard
